_comment: Stubbed OFFLINE 'web search' index for the demo. The web worker treats the 'web' source docs (see data/sources/) as if they were the open web. This file is optional metadata: it records human-readable titles/urls per source id so the stub can present results that LOOK like a search-engine result page, with NO network call. Retrieval itself is done by rag-pipeline over the doc text; this only decorates provenance.

results.title: Vector database market size and growth (analyst brief)
Acme customer sentiment and reference-call digest
Acme risks, security, and regulatory notes
